full_text:
Su Gu
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Su Gu. Was surprised and killed by Zhang Lu and Zhang Xiu on Liu Yan’s orders. Su Gu was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Su Gu lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
